sigWerNormalizedGold: 我 正 在 等 待
sigWerNormalizedPredicted: 我 现 在 当 在

sigWerErrors.reason: '正' (in the process of) and '现' (now) are different in meaning; this changes the aspect of the action and can confuse the intended meaning of the sentence.
'等' (wait) and '当' (when/serve as) are completely different words, which changes the meaning of the sentence and makes it incoherent.
